mapper.select: SELECT a.ACCOUNT_ID, p.NICKNAME, p.HANDLE, p.INTRO, p.HATI_CODE, p.GENDER, (SELECT mf.URL FROM MEDIA_FILES mf WHERE mf.REF_TYPE = 'PROFILE' AND mf.REF_ID = a.ACCOUNT_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS PROFILE_IMAGE_URL FROM USER_FOLLOW f JOIN ACCOUNTS a ON a.ACCOUNT_ID = f.DST_ACCOUNT_ID JOIN USER_PROFILE p ON p.ACCOUNT_ID = a.ACCOUNT_ID WHERE f.SRC_ACCOUNT_ID = #{myId} AND a.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY f.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT a.ACCOUNT_ID, p.NICKNAME, p.HANDLE, p.INTRO, p.HATI_CODE, p.GENDER, (SELECT mf.URL FROM MEDIA_FILES mf WHERE mf.REF_TYPE = 'PROFILE' AND mf.REF_ID = a.ACCOUNT_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM USER_FOLLOW WHERE SRC_ACCOUNT_ID = #{myId} AND DST_ACCOUNT_ID = a.ACCOUNT_ID ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS IS_FOLLOWING FROM USER_FOLLOW f JOIN ACCOUNTS a ON a.ACCOUNT_ID = f.SRC_ACCOUNT_ID JOIN USER_PROFILE p ON p.ACCOUNT_ID = a.ACCOUNT_ID WHERE f.DST_ACCOUNT_ID = #{myId} AND a.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM USER_BLOCK WHERE SRC_ACCOUNT_ID = #{myId} AND DST_ACCOUNT_ID = a.ACCOUNT_ID ) ORDER BY f.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT a.ACCOUNT_ID, p.NICKNAME, p.HANDLE, p.INTRO, p.HATI_CODE, p.GENDER, (SELECT mf.URL FROM MEDIA_FILES mf WHERE mf.REF_TYPE = 'PROFILE' AND mf.REF_ID = a.ACCOUNT_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AS PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, 0 AS IS_FOLLOWING FROM ACCOUNTS a JOIN USER_PROFILE p ON p.ACCOUNT_ID = a.ACCOUNT_ID JOIN USER_PROFILE my ON my.ACCOUNT_ID = #{myId} JOIN HATI_MASTER hm ON hm.HATI_CODE = my.HATI_CODE WHERE a.ACCOUNT_ID != #{myId} AND a.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM USER_FOLLOW WHERE SRC_ACCOUNT_ID = #{myId} AND DST_ACCOUNT_ID = a.ACCOUNT_ID )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM USER_FOLLOW WHERE SRC_ACCOUNT_ID = a.ACCOUNT_ID AND DST_ACCOUNT_ID = #{myId} )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM USER_BLOCK WHERE (SRC_ACCOUNT_ID = #{myId} AND DST_ACCOUNT_ID = a.ACCOUNT_ID) OR (SRC_ACCOUNT_ID = a.ACCOUNT_ID AND DST_ACCOUNT_ID = #{myId}) ) AND ( hm.BEST_MATCH LIKE '%' || p.HATI_CODE || '%' OR hm.NORMAL_MATCH LIKE '%' || p.HATI_CODE || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM USER_FOLLOW f1 JOIN USER_FOLLOW f2 ON f1.DST_ACCOUNT_ID = f2.SRC_ACCOUNT_ID WHERE f1.SRC_ACCOUNT_ID = #{myId} AND f2.DST_ACCOUNT_ID = a.ACCOUNT_ID ) ) ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE )
WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM USER_FOLLOW WHERE SRC_ACCOUNT_ID = #{myId} AND DST_ACCOUNT_ID = #{targetId}
DELETE FROM USER_FOLLOW WHERE (SRC_ACCOUNT_ID = #{myId} AND DST_ACCOUNT_ID = #{targetId}) OR (SRC_ACCOUNT_ID = #{targetId} AND DST_ACCOUNT_ID = #{myId})
